title: Skull [Portable]
description: Obtain and Customize Player Heads in Survival!
body:
# Skull [Portable] > **Obtain and Customize Player Heads in Survival!** # 📥How to Install Choose if you want to download the pure **Data Pack** version or the **Mod** version and follow the steps accordingly.
Data Pack * **1)** Download the Datapack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (Skull [Portable]) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
Mod * **1)** Download the Mod * **2)** Navigate to your mods folder (for the vanilla launcher the path is .minecraft/mods * **3)** Put the downloaded .jar file (Skull [Portable]) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command
# 📖Features **Skull [Portable]** allow you to **Craft** and **Customize player heads** using just a **Book and Quill**. ## How to craft and customize a Player Head
🎭Craft a Blank Player Head
A Blank Player Head can be crafted using any of the following materials:

  • White Terracotta
  • Light Gray Terracotta
  • Brown Terracotta
  • Terracotta
📋Customize a Player Head using a texture value - **1)** Head over Minecraft Heads - **2)** Choose a **head** and open its **relative page**; Then, **scroll** to the For Developers and **copy** the value field - **3)** **Paste** the copied value in a **Book and Quill** - **4)** **Hold** the desired number of **player heads** in your **off-hand** - **5)** **Hold** the **book** with the value in your **main-hand** - **6)** **Swap hands** to **customize** the **head** (Default key to swap hands is F)
🔖Customize a Player Head using a player name - **1)** **Sign** a **Book and Quill** with the **name of the player** - **2)** **Hold** the desired number of **player heads** in your **off-hand** - **3)** **Hold** the **signed book** in your **main-hand** - **4)** **Swap hands** to **customize** the **head** (Default key to swap hands is F)
YouTube Showcase
## Settings You can access the settings upon reloading by clicking on the **[Config]** button or by running the following command -> /function skull_portable:config The settings menu includes the following: + **[Player head]** Replace signed book after use: (defaults to True) + **[Custom Head]** Erase book pages after use: (defaults to True) # 📤How to Uninstall
Data Pack To uninstall the Data Pack run the command /function skull_portable:uninstall. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in the chat.
Mod To uninstall the **Mod version** you need to run /function skull_portable:uninstall command. Then you close the game and remove the **jar** file from your .minecraft/mods folder.
